---
title: 'Firestore Collections'
description: 'Detailed reference for all Firestore collections and document structures'
icon: 'fire'
---

## Overview

This page provides detailed information about each Firestore collection used in TextileFlow ERP, including document structures, field types, validation rules, and usage patterns.

---

## User Management

### `usuario` Collection

**Purpose:** Stores user accounts and employee information

**Document ID Strategy:** Firebase Auth UID or auto-generated

**Security Rules:**
- Users can read their own document
- Only admins can create/update/delete user documents
- Email and numeroDocumento must be unique

<CodeGroup>
```javascript Read User Document
import { doc, getDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const userId = 'abc123xyz';
const userRef = doc(db, 'usuario', userId);
const userSnap = await getDoc(userRef);

if (userSnap.exists()) {
  const userData = userSnap.data();
  console.log('User:', userData.displayName);
  console.log('Role:', userData.rol);
}
```

```javascript Create User Document
import { doc, setDoc, serverTimestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const newUser = {
  uid: 'new_user_123',
  email: 'newuser@textileflow.com',
  displayName: 'Maria Garcia',
  nombre: 'Maria',
  apellido: 'Garcia',
  tipoDocumento: 'CC',
  numeroDocumento: '9876543210',
  telefono: '+57 310 555 1234',
  direccion: 'Carrera 7 #123-45',
  rol: 'Empleado',
  permissions: ['read'],
  estado: 'activo',
  status: 'active',
  createdAt: serverTimestamp()
};

await setDoc(doc(db, 'usuario', newUser.uid), newUser);
console.log('User created successfully');
```

```javascript Query Active Employees
import { collection, query, where, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const q = query(
  collection(db, 'usuario'),
  where('rol', '==', 'Empleado'),
  where('estado', '==', 'activo')
);

const snapshot = await getDocs(q);
console.log(`Found ${snapshot.size} active employees`);

snapshot.forEach(doc => {
  const employee = doc.data();
  console.log(`- ${employee.displayName} (${employee.email})`);
});
```
</CodeGroup>

**Common Queries:**

| Query Purpose | Firestore Query |
|---------------|----------------|
| Get all active employees | `where('rol', '==', 'Empleado').where('estado', '==', 'activo')` |
| Find user by email | `where('email', '==', email).limit(1)` |
| Find user by document | `where('numeroDocumento', '==', docNum).limit(1)` |
| Get all admins | `where('rol', '==', 'Admin')` |

---

## Attendance Management

### `attendances` Collection

**Purpose:** Individual check-in and check-out records with validation

**Document ID Strategy:** Auto-generated by Firestore

**Security Rules:**
- Employees can create their own attendance records
- Employees can only read their own records
- Admins can create, read, update all records

<CodeGroup>
```javascript Create Check-In Record
import { collection, doc, setDoc, Timestamp, serverTimestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const attendanceRef = doc(collection(db, 'attendances'));
const now = new Date();

const attendance = {
  userId: 'user123',
  userEmail: 'user@example.com',
  displayName: 'John Doe',
  role: 'Empleado',
  date: now.toISOString().split('T')[0], // YYYY-MM-DD
  timestamp: Timestamp.fromDate(now),
  type: 'entrada',
  actualTime: now.toTimeString().substring(0, 5), // HH:MM
  scheduledTime: '08:00',
  status: 'on-time',
  minutesDifference: 5,
  source: 'self',
  notes: '',
  createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
  updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
};

await setDoc(attendanceRef, attendance);
console.log('Check-in recorded:', attendanceRef.id);
```

```javascript Query Today's Attendances
import { collection, query, where, orderBy, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];

const q = query(
  collection(db, 'attendances'),
  where('date', '==', today),
  orderBy('timestamp', 'desc')
);

const snapshot = await getDocs(q);
console.log(`Today's attendances: ${snapshot.size}`);

snapshot.forEach(doc => {
  const att = doc.data();
  console.log(`${att.displayName}: ${att.type} at ${att.actualTime} (${att.status})`);
});
```

```javascript Query User Attendance History
import { collection, query, where, orderBy, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const userId = 'user123';
const startDate = '2024-03-01';
const endDate = '2024-03-31';

const q = query(
  collection(db, 'attendances'),
  where('userId', '==', userId),
  where('date', '>=', startDate),
  where('date', '<=', endDate),
  orderBy('date', 'desc'),
  orderBy('timestamp', 'desc')
);

const snapshot = await getDocs(q);
console.log(`Found ${snapshot.size} attendance records for March`);
```

```javascript Real-Time Attendance Listener
import { collection, query, where, onSnapshot } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];

const q = query(
  collection(db, 'attendances'),
  where('date', '==', today)
);

// Listen for real-time updates
const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
  console.log(`Live attendances: ${snapshot.size}`);
  
  snapshot.docChanges().forEach(change => {
    const att = change.doc.data();
    
    if (change.type === 'added') {
      console.log(`New: ${att.displayName} ${att.type}`);
    }
    if (change.type === 'modified') {
      console.log(`Updated: ${att.displayName}`);
    }
  });
});

// Later, stop listening
// unsubscribe();
```
</CodeGroup>

**Required Composite Indexes:**

```
Collection: attendances
Fields: userId (Ascending), date (Ascending), timestamp (Descending)

Collection: attendances
Fields: date (Ascending), timestamp (Descending)

Collection: attendances
Fields: userId (Ascending), date (Ascending)

Collection: attendances
Fields: date (Ascending), type (Ascending), status (Ascending)
```

---

### `attendance_summary` Collection

**Purpose:** Pre-aggregated daily attendance summaries for efficient reporting

**Document ID Strategy:** `{userId}_{date}` format (e.g., "user123_2024-03-15")

**Security Rules:**
- Employees can read their own summaries
- Only admins and system can write

<CodeGroup>
```javascript Get User's Daily Summary
import { doc, getDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const userId = 'user123';
const date = '2024-03-15';
const summaryId = `${userId}_${date}`;

const summaryRef = doc(db, 'attendance_summary', summaryId);
const summarySnap = await getDoc(summaryRef);

if (summarySnap.exists()) {
  const summary = summarySnap.data();
  console.log(`Status: ${summary.status}`);
  console.log(`Hours worked: ${summary.hoursWorked || 0}`);
  console.log(`Was late: ${summary.wasLate}`);
  console.log(`Left early: ${summary.leftEarly}`);
}
```

```javascript Query All Summaries for a Date
import { collection, query, where, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const date = '2024-03-15';

const q = query(
  collection(db, 'attendance_summary'),
  where('date', '==', date)
);

const snapshot = await getDocs(q);

let complete = 0;
let incomplete = 0;
let absent = 0;

snapshot.forEach(doc => {
  const summary = doc.data();
  if (summary.status === 'complete') complete++;
  if (summary.status === 'incomplete') incomplete++;
  if (summary.status === 'absent') absent++;
});

console.log(`Complete: ${complete}, Incomplete: ${incomplete}, Absent: ${absent}`);
```

```javascript Create/Update Daily Summary
import { doc, setDoc, serverTimestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const userId = 'user123';
const date = '2024-03-15';
const summaryId = `${userId}_${date}`;

const summary = {
  userId,
  date,
  displayName: 'John Doe',
  checkIn: Timestamp.fromDate(new Date('2024-03-15T08:05:00')),
  checkOut: Timestamp.fromDate(new Date('2024-03-15T17:00:00')),
  hoursWorked: 8.92,
  status: 'complete',
  wasLate: false,
  leftEarly: false,
  lastUpdated: serverTimestamp()
};

await setDoc(doc(db, 'attendance_summary', summaryId), summary);
console.log('Daily summary updated');
```
</CodeGroup>

**Status Values:**
- `complete`: Both check-in and check-out recorded
- `incomplete`: Only check-in or check-out (but not both)
- `absent`: No records for the day

---

## Schedule Management

### `schedules` Collection

**Purpose:** Work schedule configuration for validation

**Document ID Strategy:** Auto-generated by Firestore

**Security Rules:**
- All authenticated users can read schedules
- Only admins can create/update schedules

<CodeGroup>
```javascript Set Default Schedule
import { collection, doc, setDoc, query, where, getDocs, serverTimestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const adminId = 'admin123';

// Check if default schedule exists
const q = query(
  collection(db, 'schedules'),
  where('isDefault', '==', true)
);

const snapshot = await getDocs(q);

const scheduleData = {
  entryTime: '08:00',
  exitTime: '17:00',
  toleranceMinutes: 15,
  workHours: 9,
  isDefault: true,
  appliesTo: 'all',
  setBy: adminId,
  updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
};

if (!snapshot.empty) {
  // Update existing
  const docRef = snapshot.docs[0].ref;
  await setDoc(docRef, scheduleData, { merge: true });
  console.log('Default schedule updated');
} else {
  // Create new
  const scheduleRef = doc(collection(db, 'schedules'));
  await setDoc(scheduleRef, {
    ...scheduleData,
    createdAt: serverTimestamp()
  });
  console.log('Default schedule created');
}
```

```javascript Set Date-Specific Schedule
import { collection, doc, setDoc, serverTimestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const scheduleRef = doc(collection(db, 'schedules'));

const schedule = {
  date: '2024-12-25', // Christmas
  entryTime: '10:00',
  exitTime: '14:00',
  toleranceMinutes: 30,
  workHours: 4,
  isDefault: false,
  appliesTo: 'all',
  setBy: 'admin123',
  createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
  updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
};

await setDoc(scheduleRef, schedule);
console.log('Holiday schedule created');
```

```javascript Get Schedule for Date
import { collection, query, where, getDocs, limit } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const date = '2024-03-15';

// First, try to find date-specific schedule
let q = query(
  collection(db, 'schedules'),
  where('date', '==', date),
  limit(1)
);

let snapshot = await getDocs(q);

if (!snapshot.empty) {
  const schedule = snapshot.docs[0].data();
  console.log('Found date-specific schedule:', schedule);
} else {
  // Fall back to default schedule
  q = query(
    collection(db, 'schedules'),
    where('isDefault', '==', true),
    limit(1)
  );
  
  snapshot = await getDocs(q);
  
  if (!snapshot.empty) {
    const schedule = snapshot.docs[0].data();
    console.log('Using default schedule:', schedule);
  } else {
    console.log('No schedule found, using hardcoded default');
  }
}
```
</CodeGroup>

---

## Inventory Management

### `categoria` Collection

**Purpose:** Product categories for organizing inventory

<CodeGroup>
```javascript Create Category
import { collection, doc, setDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const categoryRef = doc(collection(db, 'categoria'));

const category = {
  nombre: 'Camisetas',
  descripcion: 'Camisetas de diferentes estilos y tallas'
};

await setDoc(categoryRef, category);
console.log('Category created:', categoryRef.id);
```

```javascript Get All Categories
import { collection, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const snapshot = await getDocs(collection(db, 'categoria'));

console.log(`Found ${snapshot.size} categories:`);
snapshot.forEach(doc => {
  const cat = doc.data();
  console.log(`- ${cat.nombre}: ${cat.descripcion}`);
});
```
</CodeGroup>

---

### `atributo` Collection

**Purpose:** Product attribute definitions (Color, Size, Material, etc.)

<CodeGroup>
```javascript Create Attribute
import { collection, doc, setDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const attrRef = doc(collection(db, 'atributo'));

const attribute = {
  nombre: 'Color'
};

await setDoc(attrRef, attribute);
console.log('Attribute created:', attrRef.id);
```
</CodeGroup>

---

### `valorAtributo` Collection

**Purpose:** Attribute values (Red, Blue, Small, Large, etc.)

<CodeGroup>
```javascript Create Attribute Value
import { collection, doc, setDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const valueRef = doc(collection(db, 'valorAtributo'));

const attributeValue = {
  atributoId: 'attr_color_123',
  valor: 'Rojo'
};

await setDoc(valueRef, attributeValue);
console.log('Attribute value created:', valueRef.id);
```

```javascript Get Values for Attribute
import { collection, query, where, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const atributoId = 'attr_color_123';

const q = query(
  collection(db, 'valorAtributo'),
  where('atributoId', '==', atributoId)
);

const snapshot = await getDocs(q);

console.log(`Values for attribute:`);
snapshot.forEach(doc => {
  const val = doc.data();
  console.log(`- ${val.valor}`);
});
```
</CodeGroup>

---

### `articulo` Collection

**Purpose:** Inventory items with categories and attributes

<CodeGroup>
```javascript Create Product
import { collection, doc, setDoc, serverTimestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const productRef = doc(collection(db, 'articulo'));

const product = {
  nombre: 'Camiseta Premium',
  descripcion: 'Camiseta 100% algodón',
  categoriaId: 'cat_123',
  stock: 150,
  precio: 25000,
  atributos: {
    'attr_color_123': 'val_rojo_456',
    'attr_talla_789': 'val_m_012'
  },
  fechaCreacion: serverTimestamp()
};

await setDoc(productRef, product);
console.log('Product created:', productRef.id);
```

```javascript Query Products by Category
import { collection, query, where, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const categoriaId = 'cat_123';

const q = query(
  collection(db, 'articulo'),
  where('categoriaId', '==', categoriaId)
);

const snapshot = await getDocs(q);

console.log(`Found ${snapshot.size} products in category`);
snapshot.forEach(doc => {
  const product = doc.data();
  console.log(`- ${product.nombre}: ${product.stock} units`);
});
```

```javascript Update Stock
import { doc, updateDoc, increment } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const productId = 'product_123';
const quantitySold = 5;

const productRef = doc(db, 'articulo', productId);

await updateDoc(productRef, {
  stock: increment(-quantitySold)
});

console.log(`Stock decreased by ${quantitySold}`);
```
</CodeGroup>

---

## Payroll Management

### `pago` Collection

**Purpose:** Employee payment records and payroll history

<CodeGroup>
```javascript Create Payment Record
import { collection, doc, setDoc, Timestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const paymentRef = doc(collection(db, 'pago'));

const payment = {
  userId: 'user123',
  mes: '2024-03',
  monto: 3500000,
  concepto: 'Salario mensual + bonificación',
  estado: 'pagado',
  fechaPago: Timestamp.now()
};

await setDoc(paymentRef, payment);
console.log('Payment recorded:', paymentRef.id);
```

```javascript Query Employee Payments
import { collection, query, where, orderBy, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const userId = 'user123';

const q = query(
  collection(db, 'pago'),
  where('userId', '==', userId),
  orderBy('mes', 'desc')
);

const snapshot = await getDocs(q);

console.log(`Payment history:`);
snapshot.forEach(doc => {
  const payment = doc.data();
  console.log(`${payment.mes}: $${payment.monto} (${payment.estado})`);
});
```

```javascript Get Pending Payments
import { collection, query, where, getDocs } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from './config/firebase.js';

const q = query(
  collection(db, 'pago'),
  where('estado', '==', 'pendiente')
);

const snapshot = await getDocs(q);

console.log(`Pending payments: ${snapshot.size}`);
let totalPending = 0;

snapshot.forEach(doc => {
  const payment = doc.data();
  totalPending += payment.monto;
});

console.log(`Total pending: $${totalPending}`);
```
</CodeGroup>

---

## Best Practices

<CardGroup cols={2}>
  <Card title="Use Batch Writes" icon="layer-group">
    When updating related documents, use Firestore batch writes for atomicity
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="Denormalize Data" icon="copy">
    Store frequently accessed fields (like displayName) in child collections
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="Server Timestamps" icon="server">
    Always use serverTimestamp() instead of client-side Date objects
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="Composite Indexes" icon="list-tree">
    Create composite indexes for multi-field queries
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="Real-Time Listeners" icon="broadcast-tower">
    Use onSnapshot for real-time updates, but remember to unsubscribe
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="Document ID Patterns" icon="fingerprint">
    Use predictable IDs (e.g., userId_date) for easy direct access
  </Card>
</CardGroup>
